gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T2.A3 = 'south Bohemia'
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' AND T4.A3 = 'south Bohemia'
question: How many female clients' accounts are in the region of South Bohemia?
